news.headline: Hotels can refuse tourists tap water, Italy's top court rules
news.summary: The Italian Supreme Court rejected a tourist's claim that her consumer rights were breached when she was only offered €7 bottled mineral water.

news.headline: Iran warns of retaliation after fresh US strikes
news.summary: Iran warns of retaliation after fresh US strikes

news.headline: Brazilian candidate Flavio Bolsonaro asks Trump to designate crime groups as terrorists
